source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A compressor receives 0.05 kg/s R-410a at 200 kPa, 20\circ\text{C} and 0.1 kg/s R-410a at 400 kPa, 0\circ\text{C}. The exit flow is at 1000 kPa, 60\circ\text{C}. Assume it is adiabatic, neglect kinetic energies, and find the required power input.
